PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?album ?albumLabel WHERE {
  ?album wdt:P175 wd:Q1299 .
  ?album wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q482994 .
  ?album wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER(?releaseDate >= "1960-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?album rdfs:label ?albumLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?albumLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY ASC(?releaseDate)
LIMIT 1

The SPARQL query now correctly filters for albums (Q482994) and the earliest release date after 1960, which gives that album. So the answer should be "Please Please Me".

args.sparql: SELECT ?album ?albumLabel WHERE { ?album wdt:P175 wd:Q1299 . ?album wdt:P31/wdt:P279* wd:Q482994 . ?album wdt:P577 ?releaseDate . FILTER (?releaseDate >= "1960-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime) . OPTIONAL { ?album rdfs:label ?albumLabel . FILTER(lang(?albumLabel) = "en") } } ORDER BY ASC(?releaseDate) LIMIT 1
